name: Taameer Artivists Foundation
description: Foundation working for the past few years to bring positivity and equality in society to make it a better place to live.           Focusing on social causes like safaachat - initiative for cleanliness awareness, blood donation drives, clothing drive for the needy, events to provide a stage for the budding artists, and things related to social reform.
mission: We believe in the power of community action to create lasting change. Through our initiatives, we bring people together to build cleaner, more vibrant communities while celebrating our rich cultural heritage.

focusAreas.title: Environmental Action
focusAreas.description: Regular cleanliness drives and environmental awareness campaigns to keep our cities clean and green.

focusAreas.title: Cultural Celebration
focusAreas.description: Organizing cultural events like Kumaon Fest to preserve and promote our local traditions and arts.

focusAreas.title: Community Building
focusAreas.description: Bringing people together through various social initiatives and volunteer programs across the region.
